contract_summary: This is a get-wrapper that increments the reference count of the given cxgbi_sock structure. The caller must already hold a valid reference (or be in a context where the object is alive). After calling this function, the caller owns an additional reference and must pair it with a corresponding kref_put (or __cxgbi_sock_put) when done. The debug logging is incidental and does not affect the refcount semantics.
